    Mobile Pizza Oven Catering

    Fresh, Made-to-Order Pizza

     Our wood-fired ovens are handcrafted and imported from Naples, Italy.

    Neapolitan style pizza is already delicious, but when it's made-to-order from our smoldering, wood-fired oven? Fresh mozzarella cheese melting into our savory plum tomato sauce and fire-kissed crust...uno tira l'altro!

    ​

    Party planning is stressful enough. Have fun and relax with your guests while our pizza makers do all of the work for you.

    ​

    We will provide the fresh ingredients, tools, and talent to please your partygoers. Contact us using the form below for pricing and more information.
